query: extreme harsh chiaroscuro single light source dramatic black abstract shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: extreme chiaroscuro — single-source dramatic, abstract black/shadow play, deep contrast pushed to graphic abstraction

response.objective_caption: A black and white still life photograph of a single egg resting in a small egg cup, positioned toward the right side of the frame against a solid black background. A narrow band of light traces the upper right curve of the egg and the rim of the cup, while the remainder of the egg and cup blend into the surrounding darkness. The left two-thirds of the frame is entirely empty black space.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A minimalist black and white still life of a single egg in an egg cup, pushed to the right edge of the frame and engulfed by deliberate underexposure. Extreme shadow crushing reduces the egg and cup to near-silhouette, with only a thin crescent of highlight along the egg’s upper curve and the cup’s rim preventing total disappearance into the surrounding black void.
